subject.title: Issue #3573 event-driven fixture-backed domain preset pilot

collectionBoundaries.approvalAuthority: human maintainers, Copilot/Codex review handling, required checks, and repository branch protection remain the approval authority
collectionBoundaries.reportOnlyReason: The report measures traceability and instrumentation readiness for one fixture-backed event-driven pilot; it does not approve, merge, waive findings, implement a live workflow, or add a policy-gate rule.

sourceArtifacts.description: Checked-in pilot report, scope memo, evidence path, and observations for the fixture-backed event-driven pilot.
Ordering, invariant, replay determinism, and escalation assumptions.
Trace validation pass and selected-trace conformance summary results.
ExecPlan v2 artifact connecting Issue intent, invariants, domain preset report, conformance evidence, tasks, verification, and stop rules.
Evidence Sprint measurement report for the event-driven pilot.
Existing sample trace fixture used for trace validation.
Existing report-only req2run fixture used as compatible requirement-to-runnable metric evidence.
Reviewer-facing traceability preview for the event-driven pilot PR.
Final review completeness is recorded after Copilot/Codex review on the actual PR; the PR number is not known at fixture creation time.
Final completion audit is posted after PR merge because final check rollup and review completeness are not known before closeout.

time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.purpose: Measure time from fixture-backed pilot start to first runnable local trace validation and selected-trace conformance verification marker in a deterministic report-only fixture.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.calculationMethod: Synthetic fixture window from pilot start marker to first runnable local trace validation and selected-trace conformance validation marker; not derived from live reviewer or CI timing.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.interpretation: The schema and report can represent timing evidence for an event-driven pilot.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.limitation: Synthetic fixture timing proves instrumentation readiness only; do not infer review speed, implementation speed, or adoption impact.

evidence_coverage.purpose: Track how much of the required event-driven pilot evidence chain is available before PR closeout.
evidence_coverage.calculationMethod: Required source artifacts marked present divided by all required source artifacts in this measurement report.
evidence_coverage.interpretation: Pre-closeout evidence is available for Issue, pilot report, invariants, domain preset, selected-trace conformance evidence, ExecPlan, measurement, trace sample, req2run, and review preview.
evidence_coverage.limitation: Final review completeness and completion audit are intentionally unavailable until PR stabilization and merge.

missing_evidence_count.purpose: Keep missing closeout evidence visible before merge rather than implying the flow is complete early.
missing_evidence_count.calculationMethod: Count required artifacts marked present=false in this measurement fixture.
missing_evidence_count.interpretation: Two expected closeout artifacts remain until PR review and post-merge completion audit are recorded.
missing_evidence_count.limitation: This is a lifecycle state, not a failure, unless the PR is merged without review-completeness and audit evidence.

unresolved_claim_count.purpose: Confirm that the scoped event-driven pilot claims have explicit dispositions.
unresolved_claim_count.calculationMethod: Count scoped report claims without evidence, limitation, deferral, or non-applicability disposition.
unresolved_claim_count.interpretation: The checked-in report scopes its claims to traceability, domain preset application, invariant visibility, selected-trace conformance evidence routing, and metric readiness only.
unresolved_claim_count.limitation: This does not prove production event behavior, implementation correctness, or absence of untracked claims outside the report.

review_rework_count.purpose: Measure actionable review-feedback clusters that require follow-up commits.
review_rework_count.calculationMethod: Collected after Copilot/Codex and maintainer review threads are handled on the actual PR.
review_rework_count.interpretation: Not yet collected at initial fixture creation time.
review_rework_count.limitation: The final completion comment must record review rework based on actual review threads.

deterministic_replay_pass.purpose: Record whether local fixture rendering and validation can replay the event-driven pilot evidence package.
deterministic_replay_pass.calculationMethod: Pass when the documented render, trace validation, selected-trace conformance summary, ExecPlan validation, schema validation, docs checks, context checks, and verify-lite complete locally with expected fixture-level outcomes.
deterministic_replay_pass.interpretation: The checked-in evidence package can be validated without live external agent APIs.
deterministic_replay_pass.limitation: Local replay does not replace GitHub CI, Copilot/Codex review, or final PR completion audit.

manual_intervention_count.purpose: Track required human/operator actions and publication-boundary decisions for the pilot.
manual_intervention_count.calculationMethod: Count one operator decision to use a fixture-backed pilot, one selected-trace conformance routing decision, plus one required post-merge completion-audit action.
manual_intervention_count.interpretation: The main interventions are pilot selection, selected-trace evidence routing, and governance closeout.
manual_intervention_count.limitation: Manual intervention here is an intentional control and fixture-boundary decision, not necessarily product friction.

audit_discrepancy_count.purpose: Identify where completion-audit evidence cannot be truthfully claimed before final PR closeout.
audit_discrepancy_count.calculationMethod: Count audit notes where pre-merge artifacts would be misleading if described as final closeout evidence.
audit_discrepancy_count.interpretation: The flow must keep final audit wording in the post-merge Issue comment rather than the initial pilot report.
audit_discrepancy_count.limitation: This count is expected for a live PR closeout flow and should be re-evaluated after merge.

allowedClaims: Issue #3573 has a checked-in trace from Issue intent to ordering/invariant assumptions, event-driven domain preset report, conformance evidence, ExecPlan v2, measurement fixture, PR assurance review preview, and planned completion audit.
The event-driven domain preset can be rendered and connected to deterministic selected-trace validation/conformance fixtures without live external APIs.
The pilot exposes ordering and invariant assumptions before conformance findings are interpreted.
forbiddenClaims: Do not claim production event correctness, live workflow behavior, faster review, safer code, external adoption, or agent-vendor superiority from this single fixture-backed pilot.
Do not claim the PR is complete until Copilot/Codex review, required checks, full check rollup, and completion audit comment are recorded.
Do not treat report-only metrics or conformance findings as approval, waiver, or policy-gate enforcement.
claimBoundaries.notes: This report intentionally separates fixture-backed pilot evidence from post-merge PR completion audit evidence.

limitations: The selected event-driven change is a deterministic trace/conformance fixture, not a runtime workflow implementation.
The timing metric uses synthetic fixture timestamps and must not be used as speed or productivity evidence.
The selected trace conformance summary records 2 events, 0 schema errors, and 0 invariant violations; generic configs/samples findings are not selected-trace evidence.
Review rework, final check rollup, and completion audit evidence are unavailable until the actual PR reaches final review and CI state.
summary: Event-driven pilot measurement for #3573: pre-closeout evidence coverage 10/12, missing closeout evidence count 2, unresolved claim count 0, deterministic replay pass true, manual intervention count 3, audit discrepancy count 1, and synthetic timing 9 minutes limited to instrumentation readiness.
